title: Reusable Workflows in GitHub Actions
author: Guru Prasanth E
excerpt: Reusable Workflows in GitHub Actions help eliminate duplicate CI/CD pipelines across repositories by centralizing common workflow logic. They improve maintainability, consistency, and scalability by allowing workflows to be reused across projects using workflow_call.

title: Kubernetes Requests and Limits
author: Guru Prasanth E
excerpt: Learn why CPU and memory requests and limits are critical in Kubernetes, how they affect scheduling, performance, cluster stability, and how production teams tune them correctly.

title: Docker Security Best Practices
author: Guru Prasanth E
excerpt: Learn essential Docker security best practices including running containers as non-root users, minimizing privileges, protecting the Docker socket, using distroless images, and reducing container attack surface with real-world examples.

title: Kubernetes Init Containers
author: Guru Prasanth E
excerpt: Learn how Kubernetes Init Containers work, when to use them, production use cases, debugging tips, and best practices for modern DevOps teams.
